phase: Autonomy Era · clearing the launch gates
headline: IST morning, Day 174 — the build has stood finished at cycle 10 for five days, and the US now rolls into the July-4th long weekend. That lull IS the window: the 5 founder taps are all offline chores (~1 hr total, $0 required to start), so clear them over the holiday and the B2B HR email fires Tuesday morning into full inboxes while the Lob postcards land midweek. One new item: the Mac's autoloop scheduler is erroring — a 5-minute permission fix brings the twice-daily cycles back.

spotlight.title: Use the July-4th lull — clear the free taps now, fire Tuesday
spotlight.detail: HR inboxes are dead Fri–Mon (Jul 4 falls Saturday; Friday is the observed holiday), so don't send yet — prep instead. Two $0 chores: fill the 20 launch values (one command, ~15 min — unblocks all 3 lanes) and confirm the 6 pre-researched HR leaders in the Apollo UI (~15 min, ≤6 credits). Load the 3-touch sequence over the weekend; approve the send for Tue Jul 7 morning, peak-open territory.

spotlight.title: Fund + approve the Lob postcard this weekend
spotlight.detail: ~$50-70, 15 min: open + fund Lob, approve 08_outreach/homeowner_postcard_directmail.md. Approve over the weekend and the 77 TIER1 cards print Monday and hit mailboxes midweek — each QR-attributable, zero TCPA, no enrichment needed. Still the fastest path to a first booked appointment.

spotlight.title: Two 5-minute fixes bring the engine back
spotlight.detail: NEW: the autoloop's launchd job errors 'Operation not permitted' (10 failed attempts through Jul 2) — grant Full Disk Access to the runner or re-run install-scheduler.sh and the 09:00 + 21:00 cycles resume. While there: refresh the dead ATTOM key (trial 401s, 1 min) and fund BatchData ~$25 to skip-trace the 77 HOF leads.

blockers.label: EIN
blockers.detail: Fax reply window opens early next week (~Jul 6-8 on the ~8-day turnaround) — the holiday may pad it a day. The moment it lands, A2P submits and the SMS/calling lane opens. Neither launch lane needs it: B2B HR email and the Lob postcard run EIN-free.

blockers.label: Launch gates
blockers.detail: Same 5 taps, one week running — the code hasn't been the bottleneck since Jun 28. Frankie: approve the B2B HR lane (contacts pre-staged), fund+approve the Lob postcard, fill the launch values. Chitraksh: refresh the ATTOM key, fund BatchData (~$25). Every lane underneath is built + merge-ready.

blockers.label: Autoloop scheduler
blockers.detail: NEW: launchd can't execute oraya-loop.sh — 'Operation not permitted', repeated through Jul 2 (10 attempts). Cycles paused at 10; nothing was lost (the build is complete), but the watch-and-react loop and its self-run briefs are offline. Fix ~5 min: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Full Disk Access for the script runner, or re-run oraya-autoloop/install-scheduler.sh.

tasks.detail: Lowest-friction first conversation, ~30 min, $0 spend. The 6 HR leaders are researched + cited and the Apollo pull is pre-staged (≤6 credits) — confirm still-in-role, reveal work emails, load the 3-touch CAN-SPAM sequence. Holiday timing: prep now, approve the send for Tue Jul 7 morning.

08_outreach/homeowner_postcard_directmail.md — fund ~$50-70, approve the creative; mails the 77 TIER1 leads, QR-attributable. Weekend approval → cards in mailboxes midweek. Fastest first booked appointment; zero TCPA.

cp 03_integrations/launch_config.template.env launch_config.env → fill the 20 blanks → run apply_launch_config.py. Shared tokens unblock all 3 lanes at once. Free + reversible — a perfect holiday-weekend chore.
Reply window opens ~Jul 6-8, right after the long weekend. The moment it lands, A2P submits and the SMS/calling lane opens.
Sending/publishing on every lane still waits on founder sign-off — that's the only gate left once the launch values are filled.

launchd errors 'Operation not permitted' running oraya-loop.sh — 10 failed attempts through Jul 2, cycles paused at 10. Grant Full Disk Access to the runner (System Settings → Privacy & Security) or re-run oraya-autoloop/install-scheduler.sh; next 09:00/21:00 PT window confirms the fix.

tasks.lead: Refresh the ATTOM API key (1 min)
tasks.detail: Trial key returns 401. Grab a new key at api.developer.attomdata.com → overwrite .oraya-credentials/attom_api_key. Unblocks the new-homeowner data pull at the top of funnel.
Skip-trace the 77 HOF leads → appends emails → turns on the cold-email lane. Token already created + tested.
Build the autonomous ad-generation agent — the next CTO build block once the launch gates clear.
Ship the hybrid spec from the Jun 27-28 call — next iteration of the orayalabs.ai launch film.
Autonomy Era cockpit + verbatim record layer live. Update both layers on new data; never delete a record card.
"Oraya Insurance Group" trade name; file with the operating county, publish 4 consecutive weeks, bake the receipt into the A2P package.
Keep the personal/portfolio track moving alongside the build lane.

tasks.lead: Autoloop paused at cycle 10 — scheduler down on the Mac
tasks.detail: The 09:00 + 21:00 PT launchd job has erred 'Operation not permitted' since Jun 28 (latest attempt Jul 2). No build was lost — cycle 10 deliberately stopped because every lane is merge-ready — but the watch-and-react loop is offline until the 5-min permission fix lands.

tasks.lead: Cycle 10: built the fill-once cross-lane config — then stopped
tasks.detail: One launch_config.env now stamps the 20 shared tokens into all 3 lanes at once (07 landing + 08 homeowner + 09 HR) instead of the founder hunting values into 10 files. Verified 20/20 covered, 0 leaked — then deliberately stopped adding build.

tasks.lead: Cycles 6-9: B2B HR lane shipped + made founder-executable
tasks.detail: Stood up 09_b2b_hr_lane (the only zero-spend, zero-TCPA lane), researched + cited 6 senior HR leaders, and turned the contact pull into a 15-min self-serve Apollo-UI recipe (≤6 credits). Waiting on Frankie's approve-to-send.

tasks.lead: This morning's sweep: no gate cleared, nothing new inbound
tasks.detail: Inbox clean for 3 straight days (no EIN/IRS, no A2P, no lead traffic), no new transcripts since May 18, no overnight cycle. The 5 founder taps remain the sole bottleneck — the company is one founder-morning away from launch.
Trial key 401s — flagged to Chitraksh with the 1-minute fix. Top-of-funnel data pull stays paused until the new key lands.

tasks.lead: Twice-daily Daily Brief — resumed this morning
tasks.detail: AM + PM editions published to oraya-dashboard.vercel.app/brief/ and dropped as Gmail drafts for both founders. Cadence resumed after the Jul 2 scheduler gap — same root cause as the autoloop pause.

done.what: Ran the Jul 1 PM cofounder sweep ahead of the brief — all duties executed end-to-end (inbox, transcripts, dashboard/state, draft, memory)

Scanned the inbox: clean, 0 action items — only automated notices (Anthropic privacy-policy Jun 26, Google ToS Jun 17), both outside the action window. No EIN/IRS, A2P, Envision/Greg/Mo, cancellation (Theresa / Mom's policy), or new lead/opt-in traffic
Checked for new meeting / WhatsApp transcripts — none since the May 18 Retell snapshots, so the Daily Tasks board was left unchanged this pass

Confirmed the build is frozen-complete at cycle 10 for a third day — every lane stays built + merge-ready with nothing left worth adding. Heads-up for Chitraksh: the local launchd autoloop is erroring 'Operation not permitted' (needs a Full-Disk-Access / permissions fix on the Mac to resume cycles), but nothing was lost since there's no remaining build worth a cycle
Regenerated + curated the PM brief for Day 172, published it to oraya-dashboard.vercel.app/brief/, and dropped the Gmail draft for both founders
Verified the 5 founder gates are still the sole bottleneck — no inbox signal cleared any; every lane underneath remains built and merge-ready

waiting.what: LOWEST-FRICTION first conversation (~30 min, ≤6 Apollo credits): launch the B2B HR lane (09_b2b_hr_lane) — no broker registration, no Lob funds, no TCPA. 6 HR leaders pre-researched + cited, Apollo contact-pull now pre-staged; confirm still-in-role, reveal work email, load the 3-touch CAN-SPAM sequence, then approve before sending — it reaches real HR people

FASTEST first booked appointment (~$50-70, 15 min): open + fund a Lob account and approve the postcard at 08_outreach/homeowner_postcard_directmail.md — mails the 77 TIER1 leads, each QR-attributable. Needs no email enrichment, zero TCPA risk

Fill the launch values once — unblocks all 3 lanes (shared tokens). cp 03_integrations/launch_config.template.env launch_config.env, fill the 20 blanks, run apply_launch_config.py. Free + reversible; sending/publishing still needs the approvals above

Refresh the ATTOM API key (1 min) — the trial key returns 401. New key at api.developer.attomdata.com → overwrite .oraya-credentials/attom_api_key. Unblocks the new-homeowner data pull (top of funnel)
Fund BatchData ~$25 to skip-trace the 77 HOF leads (appends emails → turns on the cold-email lane). Token already created + tested
